data.title: CrowdStrike beats Q4 estimates with $1.31B revenue, $1.12 EPS. Projects $1.36B revenue for Q1. CEO sees growth in AI security.
data.description: CrowdStrike Holdings Inc (NASDAQ: CRWD) released strong financial results for the fourth quarter, with reported revenue reaching $1.31 billion, surpassing the expected $1.30 billion. Adjusted earnings per share were $1.12, also beating estimates of $1.10 per share. CEO George Kurtz emphasized the company's exceptional performance, attributing it to the increasing adoption of AI and CrowdStrike's integral role in securing AI technologies. For the upcoming first quarter, CrowdStrike anticipates revenue between $1.36 billion and $1.364 billion, surpassing estimated figures of $1.354 billion. data.title: Real Brokerage (NASDAQ: REAX) Q4 earnings beat estimates by 33.33% with EPS of $-0.02. Revenue increased by $154.51 million.
data.description: Real Brokerage (NASDAQ: REAX) released its Q4 earnings on Wednesday, March 4, 2026 at 07:00 AM. In the report, they exceeded expected earnings by 33.33%, posting an EPS of $-0.02 compared to the estimated $-0.03. Revenue saw a considerable increase, rising by $154.51 million compared to the previous year. Looking back, the company had also outperformed in previous earnings, surpassing EPS expectations by $0.01. For the detailed news, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Halogen Ventures by Jesse Draper invests in 9 Alabama startups, boosting economic growth. WIN for female founders!
data.description: One year following state investment, Halogen Ventures, a venture capital fund led by Jesse Draper that supports early-stage startups with a female founder, has reported significant progress in driving economic growth and ecosystem transformation. Nine startups have benefited from the fund's investment, marking a milestone in their mission to empower women in entrepreneurship. The fund, established in Los Angeles, made this announcement on March 4, 2026.

data.title: Huawei introduces scenario-specific solutions for 3 sectors at MWC 2026 in Barcelona, integrating intelligent tech into video conferencing.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in Barcelona, Spain, Huawei introduced a variety of tailored solutions for office, healthcare, and education sectors at the MWC 2026 event. These solutions incorporate intelligent and digital technologies into their video conferencing systems. This move aims to enhance connectivity and operational efficiency across these industries.

data.title: Natural Grocers celebrates Oregon Day with special gift and savings at all 14 locations from March 8-10, 2026.
data.description: Lakewood, Colorado - On March 4, 2026, Natural Grocers®, a prominent family-owned organic and natural grocery chain in the United States, is hosting its yearly Oregon Day event from March 8 to March 10 across all 14 stores in Oregon. The event invites customers to commemorate the occasion with complimentary Natural Grocers® products and festivities.

data.title: Kraken approved by Kansas City Fed for Fed payment systems access, but lacks full banking privileges like interest on reserves.
data.description: Kraken Financial has been granted direct access to the payment systems of the US Federal Reserve through approval from the Kansas City Fed. This allows Kraken Financial to utilize the Reserve’s payment infrastructure, a significant development for the company. However, it's worth noting that this access does not come with full banking privileges, including the ability to earn interest on reserves. This move opens up new opportunities for Kraken Financial within the US financial system.

data.title: Manuel Garza III appointed as Partner & Head of North America Power at Lattis Management LP with 20 years of experience.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Lattis Management LP revealed that Manuel Garza III is set to join the company in March as the Partner and Head of North America Power. Garza, with nearly two decades of experience in the energy sector, has served leadership positions at H-E-B Grocery Company, contributing significantly to the distributed generation portfolio. He also held roles at RPower and Austin Energy.

data.title: Bertram Capital named 2026 Top Private Equity Innovator by BluWave for technology-driven value creation.
data.description: A company based in Nashville, Tennessee, BluWave, has announced that Bertram Capital has been recognized as the Top Private Equity Innovator of the Year for 2026. This recognition was given for Bertram Capital's innovative approach to technology-enabled value creation.

data.title: Dyadic and Fermbox Bio launch animal-origin-free Recombinant DNase I product in collaboration.
data.description: Dyadic and Fermbox Bio have announced the release of their initial product following an extended partnership, an animal-origin-free recombinant DNase I that is also RNase-free. This marks a significant milestone in their collaboration. This innovative product targets industries seeking high-performing enzymes for various applications. The launch signifies the beginning of a new phase in their joint venture, with plans for further product development and expansion. This offering is a part of their strategy to provide sustainable and efficient solutions to the market.

data.title: CEIA USA unveils OPENGATE® 2.0 & SAMD® systems for enhanced threat detection and throughput; improving security.
data.description: CEIA USA, a renowned company in advanced security screening technology, has recently introduced the advanced OPENGATE® 2.0 and SAMD® systems. These systems offer multi‑caliber weapons detection, intelligent shoe screening, and record-breaking throughput levels. The equipment is designed according to the highest industry standards. The announcement was made in Hudson, Ohio, on March 4, 2026.

data.title: TScan Therapeutics beats Q4 earnings, $1.90M revenue increase, EPS $-0.18 vs $-0.27 estimate. See more on Benzinga.com.
data.description: TScan Therapeutics (NASDAQ: TCRX) released its Q4 earnings on March 4, 2026, at 07:00 AM. They exceeded expected earnings by 33.33%, posting an EPS of $-0.18 compared to the estimated $-0.27. Revenue saw a $1.90 million increase from the previous year. In the previous period, the company outperformed EPS estimates by $0.06. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.
